title: Internal error and invalid lifetime errors with clocking blocks & repeat loops

features.name: clocking block event sync in repeat loop inside fork
features.description: Code should include a clocking block event synchronization (@cb) inside a repeat loop that is within a fork...join_any block

features.name: clocking block input read inside repeat loop in fork
features.description: Code should include reading a clocking block input signal (cb.y) inside a repeat loop within a forked process
features.snippet:
fork
    begin
        repeat(5) begin
            x = cb.y;
        end
    join_any
disable fork;

features.name: clocking block output assignment with timing delay inside repeat in fork
features.description: Code should include a clocking block output assignment with timing delay (#1ns) inside a repeat loop within a fork...join_any block
